subset_composition: 2 high-coverage pseudo-haploid pedigrees (England Neolithic Twist-capture: first/second/third degree; Hungary Avar KFJ: first-degree siblings + parent-offspring) + 26 unrelated pseudo-haploid West-Eurasian-ancient fillers (no .anno relation record, distinct individuals)
ploidy: all 38 pseudo-haploid (detect_sample_ploidy==1; zero het calls in autosomal matrix); v1 hard-rejects diploid/het
snp_filter: autosomes only (chr 1-22), 1150639 sites, NO missingness/MAF filter (READv2 handles per-pair overlap). NOTE: deviates from recipe's 'full 1240K' toward the READv2-kinship-standard autosomal restriction; steppe's readv2 gate MUST apply the identical chr 1-22 restriction for P0/median parity.
readv2_window_params: window_size=5000000 (default, 5Mbp block-jackknife), window_est=False (single genome-wide P0, READv2 default)
plink_subset_build: convertf (Ubuntu eigensoft 8.0.0+dfsg-2) CANNOT read the AADR v66 TGENO magic (aborts 'bad ID (SNP): TGENO'); DReichLab EIG upstream also lacks TGENO. The bed/bim/fam were built by decoding the 38 samples directly from TGENO via make_subset_bed.py using the steppe-validated layout, then packing PLINK1 bed (A1=REF/.snp-col5, A2=ALT/.snp-col6). Decode VERIFIED bit-exact: each sample's decoded autosomal non-missing count == .anno col27 (SNPs hit 1240k) with reldiff 0.0000 for all 38.
n_windows_derivation: 565 = count of non-empty 5Mbp autosomal blocks the READv2 run tiled (run-level constant; READv2 emits no per-pair window count; steppe SNP-count windowing is a separate Phase-1 axis). Constant across pairs, not a fabricated per-pair value.
schema: sampleA sampleB n_windows n_overlap_sites P0_mean P0_norm degree z

column_mapping.degree: READv2 Rel collapsed: First->first, Second->second, IdenticalTwins->identical, 'Third Degree' & 'Unrelated/Consistent with Third Degree'->unrelated
column_mapping.z: READv2 Zup (Z_upper); 'NA' preserved where READv2 reports NA (unrelated pairs)

degree_collapse: steppe enum {identical,first,second,unrelated}; READv2 'Third Degree' collapsed to unrelated; raw Rel preserved verbatim in Read_Results.raw.tsv
pair_key: unordered, canonicalized lexicographically on Genetic ID (sampleA<sampleB)
sanity_check_vs_anno: READv2 degree calls vs independent AADR .anno truth: 695/703 = 98.86% overall agreement; first-degree 5/5 exact (both sibling & parent-offspring subtypes); unrelated background 682/685 truly-unrelated called unrelated; ALL 8 disagreements are 2.5d<->3.0d boundary cases (5 anno-2.5d called Third->unrelated; 3 anno-3.0d called Second) - the ambiguous zone the recipe sec2 explicitly anticipates. No decode errors (coverage bit-exact), no gross misclassification.
self_concordance: steppe readv2-concord --a readv2_oracle.tsv --b readv2_oracle.tsv => RESULT: PASS (degree agreement 703/703=1.0, coverage 1.0, P0 within-tol 703/703=1.0)
generated_on: box5090 (RTX 5090, host-only step; no GPU used)
